use_cases: Primary action triggers in forms and web applications
Call-to-action buttons for user conversion flows
Navigation action triggers linking to other pages or states
Destructive action buttons for delete or warning operations
Icon-based action buttons in toolbars and header controls
ai_summary: A reusable Button component built with class-variance-authority (CVA) providing multiple visual variants including default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, and link styles. Features responsive sizing options (default, sm, lg, icon), hover states, focus-visible outlines for accessibility, disabled states, and supports polymorphic rendering via Radix UI Slot for flexible composition in any UI context.
